nahuatl_text: Inin tlahtōlli īpan MSN neutral māquixtia cencah machiyōtl.
morpheme_segmentation: Inin tlahtōlli īpan MSN neutral mā-quixtia cencah machiyōtl
gloss_line: this discourse in MSN neutral OPT-produce great clarity
translation_en: In MSN neutral, this discourse should produce clarity.
translation_es: En MSN neutral, este discurso debe producir claridad.

nahuatl_text: EHN ītech tlakakilistli; MSN neutral ītech tlahcuilōlistli.
morpheme_segmentation: EHN ī-tech tla-kaki-liztli; MSN neutral ī-tech tlah-cuilō-liztli
gloss_line: EHN in-at hearing-NMLZ; MSN neutral in-at writing-NMLZ
translation_en: EHN belongs to hearing/speech; MSN neutral belongs to writing.
translation_es: EHN pertenece a la escucha/habla; MSN neutral pertenece a la escritura.

translation_en: My little heart, my little heart, you sing.
editorial_note: Example of controlled repetition and address.
Adapted classical formula; should remain annotated as literary/classical-derived.
